reviews.comment:
No vuelvo. Me llenaron el tanque mientras fuí al baño, al volver un charco gigante de 2 metros de diámetro debajo del auto, lo sobre cargaron, y en vez de disculparse,  me dijeron que mi tanque perdía (Corolla de 2 años), gracias a Dios no hubo una chispa.

(Translated by Google)
I'm not going back. They filled my tank while I went to the bathroom, and when I came back there was a giant puddle 2 meters in diameter under the car. They overfilled it, and instead of apologizing, they told me my tank was leaking (it's a 2-year-old Corolla). Thank God there wasn't a spark.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9200897225069866922/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1Mzg3TTJnRRAB
